memory.what_this_project_is: An international marketing, tourism, and community-consulting project based in the Bolivian Amazon. Synthesises high-velocity branding experience to help scale a sustainable conservation ecosystem and local volunteer program.
memory.location: Bolivian Amazon — Playa Blanca, Bolivia (travel route from Leeds)
next_actions: Use existing marketing plan and branding analysis as base for client-facing portfolio
Package pitch deck as a consulting deliverable
Connect volunteer program curriculum to AI Onboarding Map project
